mapper.select: SELECT i.* , s.name as section_name , s.description as section_KR_name FROM inspect i JOIN section s ON s.section_id = i.section_id -- ship_id 대신 고유한 section_id로 조인 WHERE i.ship_id = #{shipId} ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inspect (section_id, ship_id, status, start_time, create_date) VALUES (#{sectionId}, #{shipId}, #{status}, #{startTime}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT inspect_id, section_id, ship_id, status, start_time, end_time, create_date FROM inspect WHERE status = 'in_progress'
mapper.update: UPDATE inspect SET status = 'failed', end_time = NOW() WHERE status = 'in_progress'
